name: @rayruan/imaging-detection-mcp
description: 影像检测 MCP server：支持 stdio 和 Streamable HTTP，根据影像检测类型与 DICOM 7z URL 调用 AI Task API，返回诊断报告与 viewer url。
author: UII

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check bin/imaging-detection-mcp.mjs && node --check bin/imaging-detection-mcp-http.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/imaging-task-api.mjs && node --check src/mcp-server.mjs && node --check src/stdio-server.mjs && node --check src/http-server.mjs && node --check scripts/mcp-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/mcp-stdio-smoke.mjs
scripts.smoke: npm run smoke:stdio && npm run smoke:http
